description: A designed dark-navy graphic headed by the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement seal and the letters 'ICE'. Two blocks of white text give contact numbers: 'To report suspicious activity: 1-866-DHS-2-ICE' and 'To report a crime: 1-877-4-HSI-TIP', followed by the URL 'DHS.gov/hsi/tipline'. There is no photograph; it is a text-and-seal information card.
notable_text: ICE; To report suspicious activity: 1-866-DHS-2-ICE; To report a crime: 1-877-4-HSI-TIP; DHS.gov/hsi/tipline
